Global Railway Business | JR-EAST
# Global Railway
BusinessBetter Railway, Better Future
* ![](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/slide_pc01.jpg)
* ![](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/slide_pc02.jpg)
* ![](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/slide_pc03.jpg)
## Who we are
JR East is a passenger railway company that manages and operates railways, such as high-speed rail (Shinkansen), urban rail, and regional rail, and its infrastructure in eastern Japan. We provide high-frequency, safe, and reliable transportation services, including the Tokyo metropolitan area, that are used by approximately 16 million passengers every day.
Not only railway operation, we have also been developing businesses that lead to Lifestyle Solutions for customers, such as retail, restaurants, shopping centers, real estate, offices and hotels.
We will offer rich lifestyles for global markets by using our technologies and experience in each field and packaging our mobility services and lifestyle solutions services to match the needs of each country.
![Map Image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/img_who-we-are.png)
Railway network
7,418.7 km
Stations
1,681 stations
Daily passengers
Approx. 16 million/day
Daily train service
Approx. 12,000 trains/day
## Our Strengths
The JR East Group considers “Safety” its main management priority. Japan is frequently affected by various natural disasters, which have been intensifying of late, and we are using this experience and knowledge to promote research and development related to disaster management. We are also focusing on developing smart maintenance and environmentally friendly railways by introducing the cutting-edge technologies. Through these efforts, we are seeking to increase the “Trust” of our customers and local communities.
* [![Safety for natural disasters](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/thum_strength01.jpg)Safety for natural disasters
](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/strength.html#disasters)
* [![Smart Maintenance](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/thum_strength02.jpg)Smart Maintenance
](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/strength.html#maintenance)

](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/strength.html#energy)
* [![Mega Railway Projects](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/thum_strength04.jpg)Mega Railway Projects
](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/strength.html#mega)
## Business Area
Making use of the experiences we have acquired in Japan up to date, we are developing a variety of global businesses, primarily in Asia, together with our group companies, including [Japan International Consultants for Transportation (JIC)Opens in a new window](https://www.jictransport.co.jp/en/), such as by supporting the opening of the Indian High-Speed Rail, providing rolling stock and maintenance services for the MRT Purple Line in Thailand, and providing technical support to a railway operator in Indonesia.
![Business Area](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/img_business-area_pc.png)
1. 1Philippines
![flag of the philippines](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/icon_philippines.png)
* JIC
* J-TREC ＊1
* Rolling stock manufacturing for the North-South Commuter Railway project
* Rolling stock manufacturing for the Metro Manila Subway project
* 2Thailand
![flag of the thailand](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/icon_thailand.png)
* JR-East
* JTT ＊2
* J-TREC ＊1
* MRT Purple Line
* Rolling stock manufacturing
* Maintenance services for rolling stock and ground equipment
* 3Indonesia
![flag of the indonesia](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/icon_indonesia.png)
* JR-East
* JIC
* EJRT ＊3
* JRTM ＊4
* Provision of technical assistance for transfer of used rolling stock to local railway operators
* Operation and maintenance/Construction supervision consulting services for Jakarta MRT North-South Line
* Sales of railroad materials, etc.
* 4India
![flag of the india](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/icon_india.png)
* JR-East
* JIC
* JE ＊5
* Indian High-Speed Rail Project
* Technical support through MLIT and JICA
* Detailed design, preparation of bidding documents, bidding procedure support etc.
* Preliminary study for station area development
* 5Vietnam
![flag of the vietnam](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/icon_vietnam.png)
* JR-East
* JIC
* Provision of general consultant's services for Ho Chi Minh City Metro Line 1
* Project for Strengthening the Urban Railway Training Capacity for Railway College
* 6Singapore
![flag of the singapore](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/global-railway-business/img/icon_singapore.png)
* GATES ＊6
* Track construction and maintenance in South-East Asia
